examples: His mannerisms are more those of a preoccupied maths professor.
He was preoccupied and had not even listened to Heidi's tales.
He was too preoccupied with his own thoughts to notice anything wrong.
Hogg isn't preoccupied much -- or at all, really -- about gaining widespread recognition.
They were preoccupied with things like supply and demand and perfect competition and equilibrium.
